title: A Main Smoke
notes: Essential defensive or retake utility. Completely seals off visual lines from Main to stall T-splits and allow safe site containment or defuses.

title: A Waterfall Smoke
notes: Blocks high background crossfires from the A-truck/waterfall platform. Alignment: Keep your 1x crosshair dot directly on the brown edge of the roof trim for a perfect bounce.

title: Mid Connector Smoke
notes: Crucial tool for taking central map control or running a Mid-to-A wrap. Execution: Shift-walk forward until your crosshair's -1y line reaches the bottom edge of the letter 'C' on the wall, then execute a jumpthrow.

title: Mid Criss-Cross Left Smoke
notes: First half of the standard mid-lane tactical screen. Pairs with the Right smoke to completely blind white-box and highway lines, allowing your team to scale up mid safely.

title: Mid Criss-Cross Right Smoke
notes: Second half of the tactical screen. Blinds garage and Z-connector visibility to guarantee safe transitions toward vents or highway split parameters.

title: B CT Smoke (From Sunroom Pos 1)
notes: Core B execute utility. Completely screens off the deep CT rotation hallway. Requires holding down both mouse buttons simultaneously before hitting your jumpthrow bind.

title: B Front Site Molotov (From Sunroom Pos 1)
notes: Dual-purpose utility lineup from Sunroom pocket #1. Spreads flames directly across front site configurations. If you immediately follow up with a flashbang using the exact same lineup, fleeing anchors will be caught completely blind.

title: B Headshot Molotov (From Sunroom Pos 2)
notes: Flushes out the most common close-site defensive anchor camping behind the Headshot box. Thrown safely from the second Sunroom pocket.

title: B Heaven Smoke
notes: Blinds deep AWPers and rotators anchoring the B high-ground balcony. Alignment: Stand right in front of the circular dot on the green wall, and place your vertical crosshair axis cleanly along the wall seams.
